title: QR Code Payment After Order Confirmation & Reset Flow

requirements.text: In OrderForm, show the QRIS QR code payment section only after the user confirms their order (i.e., after the order confirmation step). The QR code must not be visible before the order is confirmed.

quotes: Payment via QR code will appear after order confirmation

acceptanceCriteria: The QRIS QR code is hidden during the initial order/cart view
The QRIS QR code becomes visible only after the user submits/confirms their order
The transition to the QR code payment step is triggered by the order confirmation action

requirements.text: In OrderForm, when the 'Confirm Payment Received' button is triggered, reset the entire order state back to the initial/empty state (start from the beginning), clearing cart items, contact info, and payment status.

quotes: After confirm payment received button triggered, refresh the order from the start again

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Confirm Payment Received' clears the cart and all order data
The UI returns to the initial order/menu state after payment confirmation
Any localStorage order data (e.g., payment timer state) is cleared on reset
The user sees a fresh start without needing a full page reload, OR a full page reload is used to guarantee a clean state

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Keep all order state management consistent with the existing local/browser-side storage approach (no backend persistence required)
nonGoals: Backend payment verification or order persistence
Changes to the WhatsApp messaging flow
Modifications to the Hero, Menu, or Footer components
